_comment: Product-type expert checklists. Each entry has a 'triggers' list (regex patterns matched against the field_of_invention text) and 'expert_categories' — what a domain expert ALWAYS asks about that product type regardless of what the inventor wrote. These supply the DEPTH that the field_of_invention anchor alone cannot.

expert_categories.name: Substrate & Form Factor
questions: Is the display substrate glass or polymer (e.g. PMMA, PC, PET)? Specify the material grade, thickness (mm), and supplier.
Is the heater film flexible or rigid? If flexible, what is the minimum bend radius (mm) without cracking or delamination?
What are the overall dimensions (width × height × thickness in mm) of the heater film as delivered?
Does the CTE of the heater film match the display substrate? Provide CTE values (ppm/°C) for both and state the acceptable mismatch.

expert_categories.name: Bonding & Interface Method
questions: Is the adhesive / optical gel pre-applied to the heater film, pre-applied to the display surface, or applied wet at assembly? Describe the assembly sequence.
Is the bonding method peel-and-stick (PSA liner), liquid optical clear adhesive (LOCA), optical bonding gel, or mechanical clamping?
What is the adhesive thickness (µm), peel strength (N/25mm), and operating temperature range of the bonding layer?
Does the bonding layer introduce optical distortion (haze %, refractive index mismatch)? Provide measured values.
What surface preparation (cleaning, plasma treatment, primer) is required on the display side before bonding?

expert_categories.name: Thermal Activation & Operating Range
questions: At what ambient or surface temperature (°C) does the heater activate? Is this a fixed threshold or dew-point controlled?
What is the maximum continuous operating surface temperature (°C) the heater is designed to maintain?
What is the maximum power density (W/m²) the heater can deliver without damaging the display or adhesive layer?
What is the thermal response time — how many seconds from activation to reaching the target surface temperature at worst-case ambient?
Is heater operation proportional (PID), bang-bang (on/off), or open-loop (fixed duty cycle)? Provide the control algorithm.

expert_categories.name: Electrical & Power Interface
questions: What is the supply voltage range (V DC or AC, Hz) and maximum current draw (A) of the heater?
What is the nominal sheet resistance (Ω/sq) of the heating element and how does it vary with temperature?
How are electrical connections made to the heater film — solder tabs, conductive adhesive, ITO bus bars, flex cable connector? Provide terminal layout drawing.
What over-temperature protection is built into the heater (thermal fuse, PTC element, NTC sensor cutoff)? Specify trip temperature.

expert_categories.name: Environmental Qualification & Certification
questions: What environmental qualification standards must the heater film meet? (e.g. MIL-STD-810 for military, DO-160 for avionics, IEC 60068 for industrial, EN 50155 for railway)
What is the operating temperature range (min to max °C) and storage temperature range required for each target deployment environment?
What humidity, condensation, and frost test conditions must the heater survive and function through? Provide the condensation onset delta-T and required clearance time.
What vibration and mechanical shock profile (g, Hz, duration) must the bonded heater-display assembly withstand without delamination or electrical failure?
What dielectric strength (V/mm) and insulation resistance (MΩ) are required between the heater element and the display surface?

expert_categories.name: Structural Design & Optical Architecture
questions: Provide top-view, cross-section, and ray-diagram drawings showing the light injection geometry and overall light guide structure.
Explain the novel extraction structure including any symmetry or complementary behaviour for dual-edge or multi-edge illumination.
Clarify whether the extraction pattern is mathematically defined and provide the governing formula, if any.

expert_categories.name: Dot / Feature Geometry & Light Extraction
questions: Describe dot or feature geometry in detail: shape, size range (µm), depth (µm), pitch variation from edge to centre.
How does dot size or density change toward the centre to compensate for attenuation of the guided light?
How does changing dot geometry (shape, size, depth, spacing) affect light extraction efficiency and luminance uniformity %?

expert_categories.name: Material, Fabrication & Performance
questions: Specify the material and refractive index of the light guide substrate.
Describe the fabrication method used to realise the extraction pattern (injection moulding, laser engraving, screen printing).
Provide measured performance data: uniformity %, luminous efficiency (lm/W), and thickness vs. prior-art comparison.

expert_categories.name: LED Arrangement & Selective Activation
questions: Provide a drawing of the PCB showing the physical arrangement and interleavingpattern of Day and NVG LEDs.
Explain the selective activation mechanism — how are Day and NVG LED circuits isolated to prevent cross-illumination?
What is the LED pitch (mm) and the minimum spacing required to achieve uniform illumination across the display area?

expert_categories.name: Mechanical & Thermal Design
questions: How does the single-PCB design preserve the original mechanical footprint and connector interface of the legacy assembly?
What is the thermal resistance (°C/W) from LED junction to PCB and from PCB to chassis? Provide thermal management approach.
What are the PCB dimensions, layer count, and copper weight used for the power planes?

expert_categories.name: Coating Composition & Deposition
questions: What is the layer stack (material, refractive index, physical thickness in nm) for each coating layer?
What deposition process is used (sputtering, PECVD, sol-gel, dip coating)? Provide process parameters.
What substrate preparation (cleaning, plasma activation) is required before coating?

expert_categories.name: Optical & Mechanical Performance
questions: What is the measured reflectance (%) and transmittance (%) across the target wavelength range?
What pencil hardness and abrasion resistance (Taber test, cycles to failure) does the coating achieve?
What environmental durability is demonstrated (humidity, thermal cycling, UV exposure per IEC 62788)?

expert_categories.name: Switching Topology & Operating Point
questions: What is the switching topology (buck, boost, flyback, LLC, SEPIC, Cuk)? Provide a schematic of the power stage including all reactive elements.
What is the switching frequency (kHz or MHz), input voltage range (V), output voltage (V), and maximum output current (A)?
What is the duty cycle range (min to max %) at the extremes of input voltage and load? Provide the governing volt-second balance equation.
What is the measured power conversion efficiency (%) vs. load curve from 10% to 100% load at nominal input voltage?
What is the output voltage ripple (mV peak-to-peak) and load regulation (%) at full load?

expert_categories.name: Magnetic Design
questions: What core material (ferrite grade, powder iron), core shape, and core size are used for each magnetic element? Provide the manufacturer part number.
What is the peak flux density Bpeak (mT), saturation flux density Bsat (mT), and core loss (mW/cm³) at the operating frequency?
What is the inductance value (µH or mH), AL value (nH/turn²), and number of turns for each winding?
How is the air gap length determined, and what gap length (mm) is used? Provide the inductance vs. DC bias curve.
What is the winding arrangement (interleaved, sectional) and the measured leakage inductance (µH)?

expert_categories.name: Gate Drive & Switch Selection
questions: What switching devices are used (MOSFET, GaN FET, SiC MOSFET, IGBT)? Provide the part number, Vds rating (V), Id rating (A), and Rds(on) (mΩ).
What is the gate drive voltage (V), peak gate current (A), and gate resistor value (Ω) for turn-on and turn-off?
What is the measured switching loss (µJ per transition) at the nominal operating point?
How is dead-time set and what is its value (ns)? Describe the body diode conduction period and its effect on efficiency.
What protection circuits are implemented (OVP trip level V, OCP trip level A, OTP trip °C, SCP response time µs)?

expert_categories.name: Thermal Management
questions: What is the junction-to-ambient thermal resistance (°C/W) for each power device including the heatsink, TIM, and PCB spreading resistance?
What is the maximum junction temperature (°C) at full load and maximum ambient temperature? Provide the thermal derating curve.
What thermal interface material (TIM) is used and what is its thermal conductivity (W/mK) and bond-line thickness (mm)?
How is airflow provided (natural convection, forced air, liquid cooling)? State the airflow rate (CFM or L/min) and inlet temperature (°C).

expert_categories.name: EMI Filter & Compliance
questions: What is the conducted EMI filter topology (common-mode + differential-mode stages)? Provide the schematic with component values.
What regulatory standards must be met (CISPR 32, FCC Part 15 Class A/B, CISPR 11)? Provide the measured emission margin (dBµV) at the worst-case frequency.
What is the common-mode choke inductance (µH) and current rating (A)? Provide the impedance vs. frequency plot.
What creepage and clearance distances (mm) are required for the isolation barrier? State the working voltage and pollution degree.

expert_categories.name: Clock Architecture & Timing
questions: What is the clock tree architecture? List every clock domain, its frequency (MHz), source (PLL, oscillator, external), and the synchronisation method used between domains.
What are the setup and hold time margins (ps) at the critical path after timing closure? Provide the timing report excerpt for the critical path.
How is clock domain crossing (CDC) handled? Describe the synchronisation method (2-FF, FIFO, handshake) used for each CDC path.
What is the PLL configuration (input frequency, feedback divider, output frequency, jitter spec in ps RMS)?
What is the maximum operating frequency (MHz) achieved in the target device after place-and-route, and at what temperature and voltage corner?

expert_categories.name: Resource Utilisation & Architecture
questions: What is the resource utilisation on the target device: LUT%, FF%, BRAM%, DSP48%, and I/O% ? Provide the implementation report.
Provide a block diagram showing all major functional blocks, their interfaces (bus width, protocol), and the data path through the design.
What pipeline depth (stages) is used for the critical datapath? What is the latency (clock cycles) from input to output?
What is the on-chip memory architecture (BRAM, URAM, distributed RAM)? State the depth, width, and read/write port configuration.
What synthesis tool, P&R tool, and device family/speed grade are targeted? Provide the full part number.

expert_categories.name: Reset, Power, & Debug
questions: What is the reset strategy (synchronous, asynchronous, power-on-reset)? What is the reset de-assertion sequence and how are all flip-flops initialised?
What power domains exist and how is power sequencing managed? Provide the supply voltage levels (V) and current consumption (mA) for each domain.
What debug and observability features are implemented (JTAG, ILA, ChipScope, UART console)? Describe the test coverage.
What is the configuration bitstream size (Mb) and configuration time (ms) for FPGA-based designs? Describe the configuration interface (JTAG, SPI, BPI).

expert_categories.name: Sensor & Transducer Specification
questions: What sensor type and sensing principle are used? Provide the full part number, manufacturer, and datasheet reference.
What is the sensor full-scale range, sensitivity (mV/unit or mA/unit), and linearity error (% FSR)?
What is the sensor output impedance (Ω) and how does it vary over the measurement range and temperature?
What is the sensor noise spectral density (nV/√Hz or µg/√Hz) and noise floor over the signal bandwidth?
What are the sensor supply voltage (V), quiescent current (µA), and operating temperature range (°C)?

expert_categories.name: Analog Front-End & ADC
questions: What is the analog front-end topology (instrumentation amplifier, PGA, buffer)? Provide the schematic with component values and gain setting.
What anti-aliasing filter order, topology (Butterworth, Bessel), and -3 dB cutoff frequency (Hz) are used?
What ADC architecture (SAR, sigma-delta, pipeline), resolution (bits), sampling rate (SPS), and SNR (dB) are specified?
What is the ADC input referred noise (µV RMS) over the signal bandwidth, and how does it relate to the LSB size (µV)?
What voltage reference is used? Provide the reference voltage (V), initial accuracy (ppm), and temperature coefficient (ppm/°C).

expert_categories.name: Calibration & Accuracy
questions: What calibration procedure is applied (offset null, gain correction, multi-point linearisation)? Describe the calibration stimulus and acceptance criteria.
What is the end-to-end system accuracy (% FSR) over the operating temperature range after calibration?
What is the common-mode rejection ratio (CMRR in dB) at DC and at the highest signal frequency?
How is electromagnetic interference (EMI) shielding implemented on the sensor and front-end board? Provide the shielding effectiveness (dB).

expert_categories.name: RF & Link Budget
questions: What is the carrier frequency (MHz or GHz), channel bandwidth (MHz), and regulatory band (ISM, licensed, unlicensed)?
What is the modulation scheme (BPSK, QPSK, QAM, FSK, LoRa SF), coding rate, and resulting spectral efficiency (bps/Hz)?

Provide the complete link budget table: TX power (dBm), cable loss (dB), TX antenna gain (dBi), path loss model and distance (m), RX antenna gain (dBi), noise figure (dB), required SNR (dB), and resulting fade margin (dB).
What is the receiver sensitivity (dBm) at the specified data rate and packet error rate (PER)?
What regulatory certification is required (FCC, CE, IC, MIC)? What is the maximum conducted and EIRP power (dBm)?

expert_categories.name: Antenna Design
questions: What antenna type is used (dipole, patch, chip antenna, PCB trace)? Provide the radiation pattern, gain (dBi), and -10 dB bandwidth (MHz).
What is the antenna input impedance (Ω) and return loss / VSWR at the operating frequency? Provide the measured S11 plot.
What matching network topology and component values are used between the RF IC and antenna?
How is antenna placement, ground plane size, and keep-out zone defined relative to the PCB? Provide the PCB layout constraints.

expert_categories.name: Protocol Stack & Performance
questions: What protocol standard is implemented (IEEE 802.15.4, 802.11, Bluetooth 5.x, proprietary)? Which stack layers are novel?
What is the maximum over-the-air throughput (kbps or Mbps) and the application-layer throughput after protocol overhead?
What is the end-to-end latency (ms) from sensor event to server reception at maximum data rate?
How is interference mitigation implemented (FHSS, DSSS, LBT, adaptive power control)? Provide the measured coexistence performance.

expert_categories.name: Motor & Mechanical Interface
questions: What motor type (BLDC, PMSM, stepper, DC brush, SRM) and rated specifications (voltage V, current A, speed RPM, torque Nm, power W) are used?
What is the motor winding configuration (star/delta), number of poles, and back-EMF constant Ke (V/RPM)?
What position/velocity sensor is used (encoder lines/rev, resolver, Hall effect, sensorless)? Provide the resolution (counts/rev) and electrical interface.

expert_categories.name: Drive Topology & Control Loop
questions: What power stage topology is used (3-phase full bridge, H-bridge, half-bridge)? Provide the schematic with device part numbers and ratings.
What PWM frequency (kHz) is used and what is the resulting current ripple (A peak-to-peak) at maximum speed and torque?
Describe the complete control loop structure: outer (position/speed) loop bandwidth (Hz), inner (current) loop bandwidth (Hz), and the controller type (PI, PID, deadbeat, predictive).
What is the measured step response: overshoot (%), settling time (ms), and steady-state error for a speed step from 10% to 90% of rated speed?
How is field-oriented control (FOC) or commutation implemented? Provide the Park/Clarke transformation block diagram and SVPWM algorithm.

expert_categories.name: Protection & Safety
questions: What motor protection functions are implemented: overcurrent (A trip threshold, response time µs), overvoltage (V), undervoltage (V), overtemperature (°C), stall detection?
What is the safe-state behaviour on a fault: immediate disable, regenerative braking, controlled deceleration? Provide the fault response timing.

expert_categories.name: RTOS & Task Architecture
questions: Is the software bare-metal or does it run on an RTOS? If RTOS, state the name, version, and license (FreeRTOS, Zephyr, VxWorks, QNX).
List every task/thread: name, priority level, stack size (bytes), periodicity (ms) or event trigger, and worst-case execution time (WCET in µs).
What is the scheduler type (preemptive, cooperative, EDF)? Prove schedulability: sum of utilisation factors ≤ ln2 for RM or provide EDF feasibility analysis.
What is the interrupt latency (µs) from hardware assertion to ISR entry for the highest-priority interrupt? How is this measured?
How is stack overflow detection implemented (canary, MPU guard region, runtime check)?

expert_categories.name: Memory Map & Boot Sequence
questions: Provide the complete memory map: start address, size (kB), and content for each region (flash, RAM, EEPROM, peripheral registers, bootloader).
What is the boot sequence from power-on-reset to application entry point? List each stage, its duration (ms), and what is verified at each step.
How is firmware updated in the field (OTA, UART, USB, JTAG)? Describe the image authentication, CRC check, and rollback mechanism.
What watchdog configuration is used (window watchdog, independent watchdog)? State the timeout period (ms) and the kick interval (ms).

expert_categories.name: Safety & Functional Safety
questions: What functional safety standard applies (IEC 61508 SIL level, ISO 26262 ASIL level, DO-178C software level)?
What safety mechanisms are implemented: CRC on configuration data, memory ECC, CPU self-test, redundant calculation, plausibility check?
What is the safe-state definition? How does the system detect a fault and transition to safe state? What is the fault reaction time (ms)?
What static analysis tool (Polyspace, LDRA, PC-lint) and coverage metric (MC/DC %) are used?

expert_categories.name: Algorithm Specification & Completeness
questions: Provide a complete pseudocode or structured flowchart for the claimed method, including every decision branch, loop termination condition, and exception path.
What are the exact inputs (name, data type, value range, units) and outputs (name, data type, value range) for each claimed step?
What is the worst-case time complexity O(?) and space complexity O(?) as a function of the key input parameter n? Provide the derivation.
What alternative embodiments exist? Specifically: can any claimed step be omitted or reordered without defeating the purpose of the invention?
What are the edge cases (empty input, maximum-size input, degenerate input) and how does the algorithm behave in each case?

expert_categories.name: Implementation Reproducibility
questions: What programming language, compiler version, and library dependencies are required to reproduce the claimed results?
What hardware platform (CPU architecture, clock speed, RAM) and operating system were used for any reported benchmark results?
If results depend on floating-point arithmetic, what precision (float32, float64) and rounding mode are required for reproducibility?
What is the claimed performance improvement (%, speedup, or accuracy gain) vs. the prior art baseline? Provide the benchmark methodology and dataset.

expert_categories.name: Model Architecture
questions: Provide a complete architecture diagram: list every layer type (Conv2D, Linear, Attention, BatchNorm), its configuration (kernel size, stride, channels, heads), and the number of trainable parameters in each layer.
What is the total model size in trainable parameters and in storage (MB for float32 weights)?
What activation functions are used in each stage and why were they chosen over alternatives?
What is the input format (shape, dtype, normalisation range) and output format (shape, dtype, meaning of each output element)?
For transformer-based models: what is the context window length (tokens), embedding dimension, number of heads, and number of layers?

expert_categories.name: Training Data & Process
questions: What dataset was used for training (name, version, size in samples, and source/licence)? How was the train/validation/test split performed?
What data augmentation or preprocessing steps were applied? List each transformation and the probability or magnitude applied.
What loss function, optimiser (SGD, Adam, AdamW), learning rate schedule, and batch size were used? Provide all hyperparameters.
What stopping criterion and number of training epochs were used? Provide the learning curve (loss vs. epoch for train and validation).
How is the training reproducible? State the random seeds, hardware (GPU model, VRAM GB), and framework (PyTorch/TensorFlow version) used.

expert_categories.name: Evaluation & Deployment
questions: What evaluation metric(s) are reported (accuracy, F1, mAP, BLEU, FID)? Provide the numerical result on the held-out test set with confidence interval.
What is the inference latency (ms) and throughput (samples/s) on the target hardware? Specify the hardware and batch size used for measurement.
What post-training optimisations are applied (quantisation INT8/INT4, pruning, distillation)? Quantify the accuracy-efficiency trade-off.
What is the minimum hardware requirement for deployment (RAM MB, compute TFLOPS, storage MB)?

expert_categories.name: Multimodal Input Processing
questions: What modalities are simultaneously supported (text, voice, image) and what is the per-modality latency budget in ms?

Is the multimodal LLM a named third-party model (e.g. GPT-4V, Gemini, LLaVA) or a custom-trained model? If custom, what training corpus, objective function, and minimum parameter count are required to reproduce the multimodal reasoning capability?
How does the system resolve conflicts when different input channels submit contradictory queries for the same session?

At what stage in the processing pipeline is user data anonymized — before the LLM call, inside the LLM context, or post-response — and what specific technique (tokenization masking, differential privacy, k-anonymity) is applied?

expert_categories.name: Communication Channels
questions: What are the specific communication channels supported (e.g. WhatsApp, SMS, web app, voice assistant)? For each channel, what API or protocol integration is used, and is each channel independently claimed or only the combination?
What is the message size limit and rate limit enforced per channel, and how are limit violations surfaced to the user?
How does the system maintain session continuity when a user switches between communication channels mid-interaction?

expert_categories.name: Cross-Platform Identity & Verification
questions: What cryptographic algorithm generates the time-limited verification codes, and what is the expiry duration in seconds?
How is a user's TV-platform identity bound to their messaging-platform identity without storing PII — what is the specific anonymization technique?
What is the maximum number of platform identities that can be linked per user session, and is there a rate limit on linking attempts?

expert_categories.name: TV Device Control Interface
questions: What protocol (HDMI-CEC, IP-based REST, proprietary SDK) is used to transmit control commands to the TV, and what is the maximum acceptable round-trip command latency in milliseconds?
Which TV operating systems (webOS, Tizen, Android TV, Roku OS, FireOS) are explicitly supported, and what abstraction layer handles firmware version differences between them?
How does the system confirm a control command was executed on the TV — ACK mechanism, polling interval, or event callback?

expert_categories.name: Content Discovery & Ranking
questions: At what interval (minutes/hours) is the content metadata catalogue refreshed, and what is the source of truth for catalogue updates?
What algorithm determines content recommendation ranking — is it rule-based filtering, vector embedding similarity, or a learned reward model — and what input signals does it consume?
How does the system handle a query that matches zero content items — fallback logic and user-facing response?

expert_categories.name: Inference Compute & Deployment Scope
questions: What is the minimum inference compute requirement for the multimodal LLM component — specifically, can it run on a standard cloud inference endpoint (e.g. 1× A10G GPU), and is on-device or edge deployment within the claimed scope of the invention?
What is the end-to-end latency budget from user query submission to TV command execution, and how is this measured and validated?
Which components of the system are stateless and which maintain persistent state — and what persistence mechanism (database, cache, session store) is used for each stateful component?

expert_categories.name: Message Format & State Machine
questions: Provide a complete message format specification: for every message type, list each field name, data type, size (bytes or bits), byte order (big/little endian), and permitted values.
Provide a complete state machine diagram for each communicating entity showing all states, all transitions (event/condition → action), and all error transitions.
What is the handshake sequence for connection establishment and teardown? Provide a sequence diagram with timing annotations (ms).
How are message boundaries delimited (fixed length, length field, delimiter byte, framing)? Provide the framing algorithm.

expert_categories.name: Reliability & Ordering Guarantees
questions: What delivery guarantee is provided: at-most-once, at-least-once, or exactly-once? Describe the acknowledgement and deduplication mechanism.
What ordering guarantee is provided (FIFO per sender, causal, total order)? Describe how ordering is enforced.
What is the retry policy: maximum retry count, backoff algorithm (linear, exponential), and maximum retry window (s)?
What is the maximum message size (bytes) and how are larger payloads fragmented and reassembled?

expert_categories.name: Performance & Security
questions: What is the maximum throughput (messages/s or Mbps) and what is the measured end-to-end latency (ms) at 50th, 95th, and 99th percentile?
What authentication mechanism is used (TLS, DTLS, shared key, certificate)? State the cipher suite and key length.
How does the protocol behave under packet loss rates of 1%, 5%, and 10%? Provide measured throughput and latency degradation.

expert_categories.name: Schema & Data Model
questions: Provide the complete schema: for every entity/table, list field names, data types, nullable, default values, primary key, and foreign key relationships.
What indexing strategy is used? For each index, state the indexed fields, index type (B-tree, hash, full-text, spatial), and the queries it is designed to accelerate.
What is the storage format (row-oriented, columnar, document, graph adjacency list)? What is the on-disk size per record at the claimed scale?

expert_categories.name: Query Performance & Consistency
questions: What is the asymptotic complexity O(?) for each claimed operation (insert, lookup, update, delete, range query) as a function of dataset size n?
What transaction isolation level is provided (READ UNCOMMITTED, READ COMMITTED, REPEATABLE READ, SERIALISABLE)? How are conflicts detected and resolved?
What is the measured query latency (ms) at p50, p95, p99 for the primary claimed operation at the stated dataset size? Provide the benchmark methodology.
What sharding or partitioning strategy is used? How are data rebalanced when nodes are added or removed?
